profile.name: Abhishek Kalyan
profile.experience: 9+ years in Customer Support and Operations Leadership

leadership_experience.summary: Abhishek has extensive leadership and mentoring experience within Amazon's SPS organization.

impact_metrics.summary: Abhishek consistently delivered operational improvements across multiple performance metrics.

operations_experience: Handled 40–60 customer cases daily while maintaining strict policy compliance.
Maintained 99–100% quality score through SOP adherence.
Handled more than 12,000 escalation contacts across calls, emails, and chats.
Supported 95%+ SLA adherence during peak operational volumes.
Worked with SQL and Power BI dashboards for operational reporting and operational performance monitoring.
Used AWS console tools to monitor operational workflows and troubleshoot system issues.

projects.name: Project Velocity
projects.impact: Reduced operational backlog by 35 percent and delivered approximately $280K in cost savings.
projects.details: Focused on workflow optimization, backlog management improvements, and operational efficiency.

projects.name: Project Sigma
projects.impact: Reduced policy deviation rates by 18 percent and generated approximately $320K in savings.
projects.details: Improved operational consistency and compliance through policy optimization.

projects.name: Project Nexus
projects.impact: Reduced onboarding ramp time by 30 percent.
projects.details: Optimized training structure and operational readiness programs.

projects.name: Global Centralized Advisor Pool Launch
projects.impact: Improved response efficiency and advisor utilization globally.
projects.details: Helped launch a centralized global advisor model where associate questions are routed to the first available advisor instead of team-specific advisors. The system has remained operational for over two years.

fun_facts: Abhishek believes that the best operational leaders simplify complexity into repeatable processes.
Abhishek enjoys turning chaotic workflows into structured systems that scale across large teams.
Abhishek treats backlog management like solving a strategy puzzle, prioritizing impact over volume.
Abhishek believes strong teams are built through mentorship and clear operational frameworks.
